name: Algosplit

methods.name: create_bill

args.name: shares
args.desc: List of share amounts for each member

args.name: mbr_payment
args.desc: Payment transaction for box storage MBR

methods.desc: Create a new bill with members and their shares

methods.name: pay_bill
methods.desc: Pay a bill share (grouped with payment transaction)

methods.name: get_member
methods.desc: Get member details for a bill

methods.name: get_user_bills
methods.desc: Get all bills for a user

methods.name: cancel_bill
methods.desc: Cancel a bill (only creator can cancel, only if no payments made)

methods.name: update_member_share
methods.desc: Update a member's share (only creator, only if member hasn't paid)

methods.name: remove_member
methods.desc: Remove a member from bill (only creator, only if member hasn't paid)

methods.name: add_member
methods.desc: Add a new member to existing bill (only creator, only if bill not settled)

desc: AlgoSplit - On-chain Split Bill Settlement Smart Contract
